creator: freebsd@jonathanprice.org
text:
Created attachment 182437
Patch including 1.27 upgrade

This is a draft patch that includes an upgrade to LibreNMS 1.27. There is a small modification to the patch to daily.sh, as I managed to push a change upstream there.

It looks like there's a couple of odd bits in that SVN diff, but i'm not enough of an expert on SVN to know what's going on there. So I would recommend you review it carefully.
